import os
import torch
import numpy as np

os.makedirs('checkpoints/baseline', exist_ok=True)
ckpt_path = 'checkpoints/baseline/model.pt'
torch.save({
    'heuristic': True, 
    'version': 28, 
    'description': 'v28 reactive heuristic: strict OA (detector<0.2+min_front<0.8, turn-to-open-side via left_d/right_d correct sign, strong backup), follow on detector>0.1|dist<3.5 base=0.25+0.2*err clipped[0.05,0.5], pure-rotate >0.4rad linear=0 + ang_k=-8, gentler when detector high+safe, refined depth (center30% min_front, sides25%, valid>0.05), per-step safe/streak/max/coll/detector tracking with exact config angle+compass, robust collision_delta. Tuned to reduce collisions, improve stabilization/speed-match vs dynamic oracle for longer safe streaks.'
}, ckpt_path)
print('Dummy reactive v28 checkpoint saved to', ckpt_path)
print('Policy updated: v28 tightens OA gating to avoid human-as-obstacle, adds open-side turning, refined gains for persistence, targets >100 safe streaks and first positive nav_seek_success.')
